message:
test(web): Remove unused variables and unnecessary test setup

useIsMobile.test.ts:
- Remove unused 'originalNavigator' variable that was saved but never restored
- Remove 'async' keyword from 'updates on resize' test since it doesn't
  use await (fixes potential ESLint warning about sync functions marked async)

utils.test.ts:
- Remove empty beforeEach hook that only contained a comment
- cn() is a pure function with no side effects; setup hooks are unnecessary
- Simplifies test file structure without changing test behavior

These cleanups reduce code noise and eliminate potential linting warnings
while maintaining full test coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
